headline: Evercore ISI Group Maintains Outperform on Danaher, Lowers Price Target to $225
summary: Evercore ISI Group  analyst Vijay Kumar   maintains Danaher (NYSE:DHR) with a Outperform and lowers the price target from $254 to $225.

headline: What to Expect From Danaher Corporation's Q1 2026 Earnings Report
summary: Danaher Corporation is approaching its first-quarter earnings release in a few weeks, and Wall Street is forecasting a low single-digit percentage rise in earnings.

headline: Danaher: A Great Way To Play Healthcare For Long-Term Dividend Growth Investors
summary: Danaher has increased its dividend for 13 consecutive years, and its dividend growth has been nothing short of spectacular. See why I rate DHR stock a buy.
